caption: A person's hand reaches into a light-colored storage bin filled with numerous black rectangular cases arranged in neat rows. The bin has a yellow-green trim along its bottom edge and a small metallic latch on the inner side wall. In the beginning, the hand grips the edge of one of the cases. As the action progresses, the hand lifts a specific black case out of the bin, revealing a white label on the inside cover with the handwritten number "13". By the final moment, the case is pulled further upward and tilted, showing a blurry image or document contained within the case. The background consists of a softly blurred brown surface, likely a floor or tabletop. The movement is steady and focused on the retrieval of the single marked case from the organized collection.
